svg.text: System Architecture — Eight Core Functions Across Four Functional Zones
• Full SOP with standard clause references (ChP / USP / EP / ICH)
• Reagent & equipment lists with quantities and specifications
• Risk assessment matrix embedded in each protocol
Output: Printable SOP + Digital checklist + Safety data sheet
• Lesson plans aligned with course objectives and credit hours
• Question bank: MCQ / short-answer / case-analysis / calculation
• Four-level rubrics with weighted scoring (Std 40 / Safety 25 / Data 20 / Eff 15)
Output: Lesson plan + Question bank + Rubric + Capability radar chart
Ethics review · Euthanasia standards · Pain management
Std Compliance 40% + Safety 25% + Data Integrity 20% + Efficiency 15%
8 Functions · 4 Experiment Types · 4-Dimensional Standards · 2 User Roles · Progressive Decision-Based Simulation
OpenClaw Skill v1.0 | Pharmaceutical Chemistry Lab Simulator | MIT License

ChP = Chinese Pharmacopoeia | USP = United States Pharmacopeia | EP = European Pharmacopoeia | ICH = International Council for Harmonisation | GMP = Good Manufacturing Practice | GLP = Good Laboratory Practice | NMPA = National Medical Products Administration | 3R = Replace, Reduce, Refine
